text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: 
The paper is confirmed real: authored by Amato, M.C., Guarnotta, V. & Giordano, C., titled "Body composition assessment for the definition of cardiometabolic risk," published in *J Endocrinol Invest* 36, 537–543 (2013)
 — exactly matching the cited reference in title, authors, venue, and year.
LINK: https://link.springer.com/article/10.3275/8943
